channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Child among survivors pulled from rubble of US-Israeli attack in Iran
item.description: Video from Iran’s Red Crescent showed a child among survivors pulled from the wreckage of a US-Israeli air attack.

item.title: Drone attack from Sudan kills 17 people in Chad as war spills over border
item.description: Local resident says casualties include mourners at funeral and children playing nearby.

item.title: China’s silence on Iran reveals its true priorities
item.description: Beijing's muted response shows that when core interests are at stake, even close partners are expendable.

item.title: Why are Iran’s South Pars gasfield, Qatar’s Ras Laffan, so significant?
item.description: Israel's strike on South Pars and Iran's attack on Ras Laffan escalate energy crisis, deepen regional tensions.

item.title: Video: Why Iran’s attack on Qatar’s gas fields matters
item.description: Gas prices have spiked after Israel’s attack on Iran’s main gas field prompted Iran to attack Qatari gas facilities.

item.title: The US–Israel war with Iran will not end with a clear victor
item.description: An arrangement that allows each side to claim it achieved its core goals is the most likely path out.

item.title: Iran’s dilemma in war and peace
item.description: Iran’s regional ambitions are increasingly constrained by military limits, economic pressure, and internal fragility.

item.title: Nigeria’s Osimhen tried to defy broken arm in Galatasaray loss at Liverpool
item.description: Liverpool came from behind to eliminate Galatasaray from the Champions League but injury for star striker revealed.

item.title: Could Iran war trigger the next global food shock?
item.description: From factories to supermarket shelves, the Iran war is disrupting global supply chains.

item.title: Conflict shifts to ‘energy war’ as Iran targets Gulf oil and gas
item.description: Following Israel’s South Pars strike, Iran has targeted Gulf energy sites to pressure an end to the conflict.
